name: Vacuumbox Minivac 0,57L
summary: Dry Goods Capacity: 1.4 oz / 30-40 g / 0.57 liter
description: Dry Goods Capacity: 1.4 oz / 30-40 g / 0.57 liter Dimension: 5.51" x 3.15" diameter (14 cm x 8 cm) The Minivac 0,57L by Vacuumbox is perfect for individuals with busy lifestyles. This compact Vacuum easily fits into bags or purses, effectively protecting and preserving items such as cosmetics, sewing kits, buttons, beads, paper clips, coins, and jewelry from oxidation. A practical part to keep your device working as it should.
